name: AniCursor
short_description: AniCursor is an application for creating animated cursors. Download pre-made cursors from the Steam Workshop or create your own using the unique editor.
detailed_description:
We are excited to introduce our new application, AniCursor - a tool specifically designed for creating animated cursors. With AniCursor, you can either download ready-made cursors from the Steam Workshop or create your own using our unique editor.

AniCursor offers you a wide range of useful features that enhance the cursor creation experience. You can easily find the cursor you need with the search function, create cursors from GIF animations or simple PNG images, adjust the selection area, and customize other parameters.

Additional, AniCursor provides access to an extensive library of ready-made animated cursors available in the Steam Workshop. You can choose and install cursors from the Steam Workshop or even contribute your own sets to the workshop, allowing you to share them with other users.

Don't wait any longer - join our community and start creating impressive animated cursors with AniCursor today!

We look forward to seeing you in our community!

Choose the best cursor for you =)

supported_languages: English, Russian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Japanese, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian, Korean, Belarusian
